economic_notes: One-seventh ownership in South Beach Casino Limited Partnership (casino and hotel on Brokenhead Ojibway First Nation land at Scanterbury, Manitoba). Share of earnings in 2023 was $1,589,733. Large school construction project in progress ($34.4M). Multiple housing construction projects underway.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Province is Manitoba. Consolidated entities include Little Grand Rapids First Nation Band Administration, Bulk Fuels, Health Authority, Miishipaawiitik Inc., 10123199 Manitoba Ltd., and 10109798 Manitoba Ltd. South Beach Casino Limited Partnership and 10123199 Manitoba Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs). Large school construction project in progress at $34.4M representing significant capital commitment. Province of Manitoba has a $302,989 claim against the First Nation; First Nation has counter-claimed for $1,856,547. No remuneration schedule provided in the extracted text. Land Management segment expenses $49,175 allocated to infrastructure/administration for reporting.
